Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Zykaros]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 13''' — Zykaros is a planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Zykaros is a location with a World Spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — The Zykaros system is a sector where Solstice's orders are believed to originate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Zykaros Prime is Horizon's Pilot's home planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Zykaros is a planet that features Subline news.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Zykaros is a planet shrouded in darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 42''' — The planet Zykaros has a toxic atmosphere and oceans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 42''' — Twisting spires on Zykaros purify the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Zykaros is a planet containing Lutoch Terelle's apartment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — The Galactic Union ID grants access to all government facilities on Zykaros.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Zykaros can warp the Aether like a gravity well.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Zykaros is described as the greatest spellcaster in the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Zykaros is described as a choked industrial junkyard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 45''' — Zykaros Prime is a location within the Zykaros system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — Zykaros is a planet with smoggy skies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — Zykaros has planetary defense systems.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — Zykaros is a location or entity that can prevent Omega from leaving.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — Zykaros is a location toward which Raion's Divine Titan was falling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — Zykaros has an atmosphere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — Zykaros has billowing clouds of hair that float like a cape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — Zykaros has tombstone teeth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — Zykaros can manipulate clouds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — Zykaros' eyes leak smoke.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — Zykaros can dissolve her body and appear in the clouds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — Zykaros is a World Spirit whose voice causes bones to tremble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — Zykaros's human form is unstable and shifts between a fifty-foot-tall titan and a normal humanoid woman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — Zykaros is a location the narrator needs to escape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — Zykaros suffered a global disaster from the Worldslayer strike.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — Zykaros' ground and sky are tearing themselves apart.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
